batch_summary.note: Nov 2022: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S001 arc candidate initialized. DARVO-adjacent lying accusation, Level E.

primary_flags.summary: Nov 2022: Melissa accuses Eli of lying within a dispute sequence. ROW-1055: 'Then you lied to me' — direct accusation that Eli's account of events is false. No specific cross-referenceable claim (not 'I never said X'); global credibility attack. Evidence Level E: reality-questioning accusation without documentable denial anchor. First arc signal: ARC-RF09-001 initialized at CANDIDATE. ADD-004 applied: first documented 'you're lying' instance, tracked in arc. Note: this is a DARVO-inversion context — Melissa accuses Eli of dishonesty while in a conflict sequence where she is the primary aggressor (RF-04 ARC-RF04-001 context). COMP-RF09-001: RF-09+RF-04 per ADD-003 (accusation occurs within DARVO-adjacent sequence).
